channel.title: +प्रपन्न-पारिजातः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +प्रपन्न-पारिजातः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: सुदर्शनः १९५४
item.description:
SRI VAISHNAVA SAMPRADAYA GRANTHAMALA No. 5

Editor: Prof. P. V. RAMANUJASWAMI, M.A. PRAPANNAPARIJATAM OF SRI VATSYA VARADACHARYA ALIAS NADADUR AMMAL

EDITED WITH INTRODUCTION, NOTES, ETC. BY SAHITYA NYAYA VEDANTA SIROMANI, VIDVAN T. K. V. N. SUDARSANACHARYA Assistant Editor Sri Vaishnava Sampradaya Granthamala Sri Venkatesvara Oriental Institute

PUBLISHED UNDER THE AUTHORITY OF SRI O. ANNA RAO, B.A. EXECUTIVE OFFICER Board of Trustees, T. T. Devasthanams, Tirupati

1954 PRINTED AT TIRUMALA-TIRUPATI DEVASTHANAMS PRESS TIRUPATI [[P1]]
